subparts.text: The role of computer software has undergone significant change over the last half century. Enumerate the concerns that led to the adoption of software engineering practice. 5
Requirements elicitation process ensures the development of a system that meets user and business needs effectively. Briefly discuss the various steps of generic elicitation process. 5

There is no unique, perfect and ready-to-use process model that can be adopted one and for all, in all organisations, for all kinds of products or product families. Describe some factors that play a vital role in choosing a Software Process Model. 5

When you work to build a product or system, it is important to go through as series of predictable steps-a road map that helps you create a timely, high-quality, result. How the software process forms the basis to achieve this goal. 10
As the requirements are identifies and the requirements model is being created. Portray the relationship between requirements elicitation and model building. 10
Draw the context level Data Flow Diagram 10
